description: `list`      ‚Äî manager landing page: table of past / scheduled / draft backtests + "+ New backtest". `configure` ‚Äî the directional pipeline (steps 01..04) for a single run. `running`   ‚Äî live progress for a launched run. `results`   ‚Äî verdict, metrics, divergences for a finished run.
title: BacktestStage
